{{CargoRelic
|name=La La Land
|class_id=21478
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Wilder and Dolan dance together under the night sky, a beautiful moment captured inThis music box. The film tells the story of two protagonists pursuing their dreams in Los Angeles and eventually falling in love. The film offers a new interpretation of classic Hollywood musicals, with meticulous use of color, music, and cinematography. The film employs rich colors and dreamlike lighting to create different emotional atmospheres. Additionally, its music and dance choreography pay homage to and innovate upon traditional musicals. The film's non-linear narrative structure and profound exploration of the themes of dreams and reality add artistic depth to the film.
|fame=54
|art=107
|fth=69
|civ=72
|tech=60
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail ATK +100<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill3=[[File:Skill skill III.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
